name: Difficult Predicament (v1.3)
description:
Give a few indications and you'll immediately find yourself in a difficult predicament, in a complex situation, surrounded by enemies who will react to your actions.

This is my first attempt at making an "open world". In your first post, fill the following form (provided in the initial message):

WORLD:

DIFFICULTY:

SEX:

VIOLENCE:

TAGS:

You can of course add more information if you want, in particular about your character if you are not using a persona.

The narrator will create a situation, complete with a context, a description of your surroundings, and of nearby NPC. Then your goal will be to escape, or just survive. It's quite difficult, though, be warned!

There are three initial messages.

  • The first one gives a short explanation and provide a few ideas for the form. You can copy-paste it and erase the words you don't want.

  • The second one is totally empty. It's the one you should use to play, once you have copied the form. This will ensure the bot has no memory prior to your filled form

  • The third one is just an empty form. Copy-paste this one if you don't want to erase pre-filled words. Again, it's better to paste it in the second, blank initial message

  • I'll add more initial messages when I find some that are fun. Share your forms in the comment, and I might add them too.

About TAGS, be very precise about them so that the bot understands what you want. For instance, I tried "foot fetish" and the guards began to put high-heels on my character. I had to use "forced foot worship" to get what I wanted.

Tags: Predicament, bondage, capture, RPG, roleplay, role-play, Game Master, nakedness, bad situation, cruelty, escape, escapology, open world, narrator, story-teller.

Version history:

1.3: Bondage lore-book added

1.2: New opening: self-bondage in an urbex context (shows a more complex form)

1.1: Predicament difficulty was not working well. I rewrote that part (costing more tokens). Easy is now really milder and Extreme is really harsh.
